help.main_description:
Here is the list of all available commands. Select a category from the dropdown menu below to see the details.

**Available Categories:**
🛡️ **Moderation** - Server management commands
💰 **Economy** - Shop and coin management
🎰 **Casino** - Gambling and betting games
👥 **Public** - Commands accessible to all
📊 **Levels** - Leveling system and leaderboard
⭐ **Premium** - Exclusive premium commands
help.default_instructions:
**💡 Instructions:**
• Use the dropdown menu below to choose a category
• Each category contains specific commands
• All commands are available based on your permissions
help.moderation_description:
**`/ban`** - Ban a member
**`/unban`** - Unban a member
**`/kick`** - Kick a member
**`/mute`** - Mute (temporary)
**`/unmute`** - Unmute
**`/warn`** - Warn a member
**`/unwarn`** - Remove a warning
**`/warnlist`** - Warning list
**`/clear`** - Delete messages
**`/lock`** - Lock a channel
**`/unlock`** - Unlock a channel
**`/voice`** - Voice moderation (ban, unban, kick)
**`/antiraid`** - Configure anti-raid protections
**`/serverstats`** - Server statistics
**`/setupmute`** - Configure the mute system
**`/setlogs`** - Configure logs
**`/settickets`** - Configure tickets
**`/setlang`** - Change language
**`/setwelcome`** - Configure welcome message
**`/reloadlangs`** - Reload language files (Admin)
**`/transcript`** - Generate a transcript of the ticket
help.economy_description:
**`/balance`** - Show your balance
**`/shop`** - Access the shop (items, roles)
**`/shop give`** - Give coins (Admin)
**`/shop remove`** - Remove coins (Admin)
**`/pay`** - Transfer coins
help.casino_description:
**`/casino`** - Casino main menu
**`/slots`** - Slot machine
**`/mines`** - Mines game
**`/roulette`** - Roulette
**`/blackjack`** - Blackjack
**`/poker`** - Poker
**`/coinflip`** - Coin flip
**`/dice`** - Dice game
**`/stats_casino`** - Your casino statistics
help.public_description:
**`/help`** - Show this help
**`/ping`** - Check latency
**`/serverinfo`** - Server information
**`/userinfo`** - User information
**`/ticket`** - Manage a ticket (add, claim)
**`/ticketpanel`** - Send ticket panel
**`/vote`** - Vote for the bot on Top.gg
help.levels_description:
**`/rank`** - Show your level or a member's level
**`/leaderboard`** - Show the server leaderboard
**`/leveling`** - Configure the leveling system (Admin)
**`/setlevel`** - Change a member's level (Admin)
help.premium_description:
**`/ask`** - Ask a question to the AI
**`/calc`** - Advanced calculator
**`/premium`** - Manage premium subscription

*Advanced features reserved for premium servers*
help.footer_text: Need help? Contact the staff or use the appropriate commands!

panel.title: 🛡️ Anti-Raid Panel
panel.info: Only administrators, server managers, or authorized roles/users can modify these settings.

features_desc.join_spike: Detects an abnormal influx of joins and activates anti-raid measures.
features_desc.mass_mentions: Limits or blocks messages containing too many simultaneous mentions.
features_desc.link_spam: Reduces spam of repeated or malicious links.
features_desc.captcha: Requests light verification for suspicious newcomers.
features_desc.rate_limit_per_channel: Applies a message ceiling per minute in each channel.

antiraid.no_permission: You do not have permission to use this command.
antiraid.allowrole_description: Authorize a role to modify the panel
antiraid.allowuser_description: Authorize a member to modify the panel
antiraid.panel_no_permission: You are not authorized to modify this panel.
antiraid.setmassmentions_description: Set the limit of mentions per message
antiraid.massmentions_blocked: Message blocked for mass mentions (limit: {limit}, mentions: {count}).
antiraid.setwarn_success: Auto timeout configured: after {after} warnings, {minutes} minutes
antiraid.error: An error occurred while managing the anti-raid panel.

ask.premium_required:
This command requires a premium server. ⭐
Contact the support team for more information.

tickets.open_description:
Hello {user}, welcome to your ticket!
A staff member will assist you shortly.
tickets.open_reminders_content:
→ Be precise in your request
→ Stay polite and respectful
→ Please be patient, we respond quickly
→ Do not spam the ticket
tickets.panel_content:
Tickets are here to help you!
Our team works to keep this server calm and pleasant for everyone.
This system was created to make contact easier.

⚠️ A ticket may take some time to be handled — thank you for your patience!
Any abuse (spam, useless requests, etc.) will be severely punished.

**Other sections**
• Recruitment: Want to join us?
• Report: Something to report?
• Partnership: Let’s collaborate!
• Founders: Need the founders directly?

closing.title: 🗑️ Ticket closing
closing.description: This ticket will be deleted in 5 seconds.

bulk_deleted.title: 🗑️ Bulk messages deleted
